prompt: Order these zoological events from earliest to latest

events.title: Lamarck proposes evolution
events.fact: 1809 — Lamarck details inheritance of acquired traits

events.title: Darwin visits Galápagos
events.fact: 1835 — HMS Beagle lands, notes unique wildlife

events.title: Goodall studies chimpanzees
events.fact: 1960 — Jane Goodall observes tool-making in Gombe

events.title: Hydrothermal vents found
events.fact: 1977 — discovery of deep sea ecosystems living without sunlight

events.title: Dolly the Sheep cloned
events.fact: 1996 — first mammal cloned from adult somatic cell

events.title: Coelacanth population found
events.fact: 2005 — population of 'living fossil' fish found off Tanzania
